name: fractal-monorepo
comment: Workspaces fenced to the function-core spine slice. packages/{openapi-api-projector,client-api-projector} and examples/{todo-api,dogfood} are FENCED OUT pending migration to the function-core model — see TODO.md. packages/codegen (types+JSDoc → runtime schema extractor) was merged into packages/type-ir — extract/tree/compile/cli are type-ir concerns.
